mapper.sql: id, name, description, price, category, image_url, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (id, name, description, price, category, image_url, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{category}, #{imageUrl}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM products WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM products WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM products WHERE category = #{category} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE products
name = #{name}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, category = #{category}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE products SET deleted_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
